steps.t: The white standing stone is in the old Edain mounds north-east of Glamír's home, near the ruins of an old building. Glamír told you to take the Elf-st…
Glamír is within the ruin, south-west of the ancient Edain mounds. As Glamír foretold, the Elf-stone drew forth the master of the wights. You should r…
